statements.select: SELECT TOP 1 SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,1) + CITYNM CITYCODE,SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3)+TOWNNM TOWNCODE,ZIP_CO ZIPCO FROM ZIPCODE WHERE ZIP_CO = #ZipCode#
SELECT TOP 1 SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,1) + CITYNM CITYCODE,SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3)+TOWNNM TOWNCODE,ZIP_CO ZIPCO FROM ZIPCODE WHERE SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3) = #ZipCode#
SELECT TOP 1 SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,1) + CITYNM CITYCODE,SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3)+TOWNNM TOWNCODE,SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3) ZIPCO FROM ZIPCODE WHERE SUBSTRING(ZIP_CO,1,3) = #ZipCode#
